- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: The file exists and was updated during project creation.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Requirements were provided by the user, including the pages, search behavior, cart demo behavior, backend/frontend split, AI endpoint, and tests.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created a standard .NET 8 multi-project solution in the current folder with frontend, backend, shared models, AI library, and tests.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented the e-commerce demo UI, API endpoints, in-memory data, semantic search flow, and deliberate cart/search behaviors.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions were needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: `dotnet build Zava.sln` succeeds with no warnings or errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Added and ran a VS Code build task for `dotnet build Zava.sln`.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Summary: Not launched because debug/run confirmation was not requested.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README was added and this file was cleaned up to reflect the completed work.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
